overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival game showing a character equipped with a bow and backpack traversing a snowy mountain forest. The character moves continuously through varying terrain including open woodland, rocky passages, and past wooden barricades under overcast winter skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy forest with scattered boulders

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through open snowy woodland, surveying the environment while equipped with a bow and backpack

entered.detail: expansive snow-covered forest floor with visible footprints
tall evergreen pine trees dusted with snow
large gray rocks partially buried in snow
leafless dead tree trunk standing among evergreens

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide snowy forest clearing with scattered boulders and pine trees. The character walks forward through deep snow under an overcast sky, with no other agents present. The environment is natural and undisturbed, with snow-covered ground extending in all directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest corridor with dense pine cover

events.description: terrain shifts from open clearing to narrow passage between large rock formations

agents.ego_description: navigating through a tighter rocky corridor, moving between large boulders and dense trees while maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: massive gray rock outcrops creating a natural corridor
steep rock face covered in patches of snow

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrower rocky corridor flanked by large boulder formations and dense pine trees. The spatial layout becomes more enclosed as sky visibility decreases to partial. The terrain remains snow-covered but the path winds between natural rock walls, creating a more confined traversal experience.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy trail with wooden barricade and warning signs

events.description: character approaches and climbs over a wooden barricade fence with warning signs

agents.ego_description: approaching a wooden barricade, climbing over it, and continuing into the restricted area beyond while scanning the surroundings

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence blocking the path with horizontal planks
white sign with black text attached to the barricade

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a man-made wooden barricade blocking the snowy trail. After climbing over the fence with its attached warning signs, the character continues through a rocky area with moderate tree cover. The presence of the barricade indicates a transition into a potentially restricted zone within the forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vast snowy wilderness that gradually transitions from an open forest into a restricted, enclosed rocky passage. It begins in a wide clearing of deep snow and scattered pine trees under an overcast sky, moving forward through the undisturbed natural landscape. As the character advances, the environment shifts into a narrower corridor where large boulder formations and dense trees close in, limiting the view of the sky. The scene then leads toward a man-made wooden barricade with warning signs blocking the trail, before the camera follows the character as they climb over the fence and continue through a rocky, moderately wooded area.
